snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real вАЬowners of the songвАЭ have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer 
1st Ad - Jass
Dop - Munish Shunty
Editor - CutsbyNav ( Navraj)
Colorist - Mr Luv
Production- Kainth Production ( Gagan)
Choreographer- Amit syal
Jib - Sonu
Makeup - Guru and Team
Hair - Sahil ( Barber king )
Art director - Kaka Art
Costume- Rajat Manchanda
Camera - cenidream
Focus puller - Gaggu
Editor - Cuts By Nav
VFX  - Rahul (the.vfx.wala)
BTS - J Singh & Ashu Dadwal
USA production: 
Front Line Production @spicegridproductions @gigipanwar
Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera

Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Bhoot Mere Pe

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DвАЩSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorвАЩs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

вАЬTimi HoвАЭ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

вАЬTimi HoвАЭ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Ghaamchhaya | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
This is me and the band performing вАЬGhaamchhayaвАЭ live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. ItвАЩs the title track from the album вАЬGhaamChhaya,вАЭ and it talks about how someoneвАЩs absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals вАФ Yabesh Thapa
Female BV вАФ Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar вАФ John Tamang
Drums вАФ Stifler
Bass вАФ Av Kc
Electric Guitar вАФ Roshan Lama
Sarangi вАФ Kiran Maharjan
Flute вАФ Shrijan Maharjan
Cello вАФ Iva Maharjan
Violin вАФ Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer вАФ Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Mastered вАФ Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

¬© 2026 ClassX Presentation

This is me and the band performing вАЬGhaamchhayaвАЭ live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. ItвАЩs the title track from the album вАЬGhaamChhaya,вАЭ and it talks about how someoneвАЩs absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals вАФ Yabesh Thapa
Female BV вАФ Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar вАФ John Tamang
Drums вАФ Stifler
Bass вАФ Av Kc
Electric Guitar вАФ Roshan Lama
Sarangi вАФ Kiran Maharjan
Flute вАФ Shrijan Maharjan
Cello вАФ Iva Maharjan
Violin вАФ Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer вАФ Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Mastered вАФ Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

¬© 2026 ClassX Presentation

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate

snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keвА¶
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keвА¶. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke вА¶. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keвА¶
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

вЦЇ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. KripaвАЩs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: ROBLOX BECOME A LUCKY BLOCK..
snippet.description:
Today I became a lucky block in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

id.title: ROBLOX MENJADI BLOK KEBERUNTUNGAN..
id.description:
Hari ini aku menjadi blok keberuntungan di Roblox. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

MERCH FOLTYN: https://foltyn.shop/

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX вАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun вАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

snippet.title: DJ Snake - Let Me Love You (Lyrics) ft. Justin Bieber
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (рЯФФ) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

https://soundcloud.com/djsnake

Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/gsevenrecords/

We have an official permission from the right holders to upload this music

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Justin Bieber]
I used to believe
We were burnin' on the edge of somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Sellin' a dream
Smoke and mirrors keep us waitin' on a miracle (Oh)
On a miracle (Oh)

[Pre-Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Say, go through the darkest of days
Heaven's a heartbreak away
Never let you go, never let me down
Oh, it's been a hell of a ride
Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

[Drop]

[Verse 2: Justin Bieber]
Don't fall asleep (Ooh)
At the wheel, we've got a million miles ahead of us
Miles ahead of us
All that we need (Ah)
Is a rude awakening to know we're good enough
(Yeah) Know we're good enough

[Pre-Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Say, go through the darkest of days
Heaven's a heartbreak away
Never let you go, never let me down
Oh it's been a hell of a ride
Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

[Bridge: Justin Bieber]
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go (Woah)
No, never let you go (Ooh)
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go (Oh no, no, no, no)
Never let you go (Yeah)
No, never let you go (Yeah)

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | вА™вА™ @astheticavi  |вА™вА™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someoneвАЩs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

(c) Aviverse 2026

snippet.description:
How do you survive when 1,000 people are HUNTING you???
SUBSCRIBE!!!

JOIN MY DISCORD TO BE IN A VIDEO:
!!!!!! http://discord.gg/karlrecords !!!!!!

----------------------------------------------------------------
Follow me on all socials!
вАҐ Twitter - https://twitter.com/KarlJacobs_
вАҐ Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/karljacobs/
--------------------------------------------------------------------

ABOUT THIS VIDEO:

In this video Karl challenges MinecraftвАЩs deadliest players: ClownPierce, Purpled, and FlameFrags to take on 1,000 REAL players. If a hunter manages to take down one of the deadliest players, that individual will earn $10,000 per kill. If any of the Deadliest Players can survive to the end, successfully wiping out all 1,000 hunters, theyвАЩll shared a massive prize of $50,000.

All of the events, reactions, story points, and players in this video are 100% real. The exact order of events may stray away chronologically to preserve clear storytelling. Grateful to 1,000 of you who were in this event, see you next time!

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вХ∞вФИвЮ§ Dive into the lyrics of вАЬYoung And BeautifulвАЭ вАФ a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound вАФ itвАЩs memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics) вЦґпЄО вАҐбБКбБК||бБК|бБЛ||||бБЛбБК|вАҐ 3:57
#LanaDelRey #pop #alternative
 
вХ∞вФИвЮ§ On this channel, youвАЩll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

пљ°пљ•:*ЋЪ:вЬІпљ° пљ°пљ•:*ЋЪ:вЬІпљ° пљ°пљ•:*ЋЪ:вЬІпљ°пљ°пљ•:*ЋЪ:вЬІпљ°пљ°пљ•:*ЋЪ:вЬІпљ°

Lyrics:
I've seen the world, done it all, had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face, and electric soul
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that you'll let him in
Father, tell me if you can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm not young and beautiful?

I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm not young and beautiful?

Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, cre√Ђren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen вАУ of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I canвАЩt believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide рЯЪА https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store

Presenting the official video of Zihaal e Miskin - the heartbreak song of the season. Featuring Rohit Zinjurke and Nimrit Ahluwalia, this melody has been sung by Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal, music by Javed-Mohsin And lyrics by Kunaal Vermaa.

#ZihaaleMiskin #RohitZinjurke #NimritKaurAhluwalia
